commands: vp install # should install packages first
vp outdated testnpm2 # should outdated package
vp outdated test-vite* # should outdated with glob pattern not working on npm
vp outdated --format json # should support json output
vp outdated --format list # should support list output
vp outdated --format table # should support table output
vp outdated -r # should support recursive output
vp outdated -P # should support prod output
vp outdated -D # should support dev output
vp outdated --no-optional # should support no-optional output
vp outdated --compatible # should compatible output nothing
json-edit package.json '_.optionalDependencies["test-vite-plus-other-optional"] = "^1.0.0"' && vp outdated --compatible # should support compatible output with optional dependencies
vp outdated --sort-by name # should support sort-by output
